steps.t: Gárnoth's Farm is to the south of Forlaw. A little down the road past the south gate of Forlaw is a path to the right that leads to this farm.
Orcs seem to have recently captured Gárnoth's Farm. Most of the Orcs appear to carry arrows on them, and collecting arrows for Forlaw's defences shoul…
Cyneberg is keeping Gárwig company in Lornsettle, the mead hall of Forlaw.
